meta.title: A Conversation with Indian Ambassador Taranjit Singh Sandhu
meta.description:
Please join Hudson Institute President and CEO John Walters and India’s Ambassador to the U.S. Taranjit Singh Sandhu for a discussion on U.S.-India relations.

Both India and the U.S. face many challenges, including ongoing efforts to combat COVID-19, vaccine distribution, and emerging threats in the Indo-Pacific. These challenges also create opportunities for partnership between the two countries. Join Ambassador Sandhu and John Walters as they discuss these topics and the future of U.S.-India relations.
